executives.name: Barrie Van Der Merwe
executives.background: Mr. Van Der Merwe joined Evolution as Chief Financial Officer in 2023. He has extensive experience in the resources sector, having held senior financial roles at Orica and Anglo American Platinum.

executives.name: Gary Nagle
executives.background: Gary Nagle joined Glencore in 2000 and was appointed Chief Executive Officer in July 2021. He has held various senior roles across the group, including CEO of Glencore's coal assets in Australia and head of the ferroalloys marketing business in Switzerland. He holds commerce and accounting degrees from the University of the Witwatersrand and is a Chartered Accountant in South Africa.

executives.name: Natascha Viljoen
executives.background: Ms. Viljoen has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer since October 2023. Previously, she was the CEO of Anglo American Platinum from 2020 to 2023.

board_of_directors.name: Gary Nagle
board_of_directors.background: Gary Nagle joined Glencore in 2000 and was appointed Chief Executive Officer in July 2021. He has held various senior roles across the group, including CEO of Glencore's coal assets in Australia and head of the ferroalloys marketing business in Switzerland.
